healthcare_disease_prediction.description: Predict disease risk based on patient demographics and medical measurements
healthcare_disease_prediction.use_case: Hospitals can collaboratively train disease prediction models without sharing patient records

iot_anomaly_detection.description: Detect anomalies in IoT sensor data and device behavior
